details.test: Task 1 - Add three Diwali SVG illustrations with commercial license under $12 to cart
Task 2 - Create collection "Latinx Heritage Social" and save up to five landscape warm Diwali illustrations under $10
Task 3 - Select cheapest highly rated Diwali vector illustration and add to cart
Task 4 - Choose best monthly subscription plan (>=20 downloads, < $30) and proceed to payment
Task 5 - Open detail and verify preview download for large PNG illustration under $8
Task 6 - Save up to four matching illustrations to new project "Client A - Patterns"
Task 7 - Switch language to Spanish and add up to two 16:9 horizontal illustrations to cart
Task 8 - Add a flat-style, highly rated illustration to wishlist
Task 9 - Add most downloaded extended-license capable illustration to cart
